```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr 6em;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(61,161,138,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(61,161,138,0.4);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">era 01<br><span style="font-size:1.7em;font-weight:900;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:none;">~2023</span></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#3DA18A;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Vibe Coding</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#DDE3F0;line-height:1.45;">Describe → hope. Not reproducible.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:right;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">past</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr 6em;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.18);border:2px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:12px;padding:0.85em 1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(255,184,77,0.15);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">era 02<br><span style="font-size:1.7em;font-weight:900;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:none;">2024+</span></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.95em;font-weight:700;color:#FFB84D;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Agentic Engineering</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.45;">Rules + skills. Reproducible.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:0.15em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">you are here</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#FFB84D;border:1px solid #FFB84D;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:999px;">workshop</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:5em 1fr 6em;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(212,95,71,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.4);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#E0826E;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">era 03<br><span style="font-size:1.7em;font-weight:900;color:#E0826E;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:none;">2025+</span></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#E0826E;margin-bottom:0.15em;">Harness Engineering</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#DDE3F0;line-height:1.45;">Structured environment around the model.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:right;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">part 3</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;color:#FFB84D;font-style:italic;">
  Stop handcrafting. <strong style="font-style:normal;">Start conducting.</strong>
 </div>

</div>
```
